trades.market: Will Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) hit (HIGH) $382.50 Week of April 27 2026?
trades.research_summary: TSLA currently at $378.02 with today's high at $378.17 — only 1.14% ($4.33) below the $382.50 target. Today's intraday range of $10 (2.6%) demonstrates sufficient volatility. Stock has positive momentum (+1.40% today). With 1.5 trading days remaining, barrier-touch probability models suggest ~60-65% chance of hitting $382.50 at any point, vs market pricing of 41%.
key_factors: Only 1.14% gap between current high ($378.17) and target ($382.50)
High daily volatility — today's $10 range easily encompasses the needed move
1.5 trading days remaining with positive momentum (+1.4% today)
trades.bear_case: End-of-week profit-taking, resistance at $380 round number, or broad market selloff Friday could prevent the stock from reaching $382.50

trades.research_summary: SG missed Q4 earnings significantly (-$0.42 vs -$0.27 consensus). Company remains unprofitable with wide analyst estimate range (-$0.99 to -$0.64 FY). 86% beat probability appears inflated given recent execution failure.
key_factors: Significant prior quarter miss (56% worse than consensus)
Company still unprofitable with uncertain trajectory
Base rate for earnings beats ~70% but 86% pricing seems elevated for a company with recent miss
Wide analyst estimate range signals high uncertainty
trades.bear_case: Analysts may have substantially lowered Q1 estimates post-miss, making a beat mechanically easier; general earnings beat rates are high
